items.title: Naked man steals ambulance with patient inside .
items.dek: Scary, the patient who was in the ambulance should sue in my opinion. That's terrifying being at the mercy of some random criminal. The patient was unharmed tha
items.body: Scary, the patient who was in the ambulance should sue in my opinion. That's terrifying being at the mercy of some random criminal. The patient was unharmed thankfully. This sounds like a episode of the pitt when they steal the ambulance. submitted by /u/Hailsabrina [link] [comments]
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Iran’s supreme leader threatens to sink US warships as nuclear talks continue
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Do not give away Diego Garcia, Trump tells UK
items.dek: The US president says "it will be a blight on our great ally" if the islands are handed over to Mauritius.
items.body: The US president says "it will be a blight on our great ally" if the islands are handed over to Mauritius.
